Support leaf status totals: supported: 280; unsupported: 230; unknown: 0. Unknown leaves stay explicit until the registry support metadata is verified.

| `aider` — Aider | yes<br>`${HOME}/.aider.conf.yml` | yes<br>`${CWD}/.aider.conf.yml` | no | no | no | no | no | no | no | no | official: 10 areas; sources: 4<br>This leaf covers the YAML config file; aider's separate .env loading is documented but not modeled as support.config.<br>Aider searches home, git-root, and current-directory config files; this registry anchors local support to ${CWD}.<br>Aider has no skills system; conventions are loaded as plain markdown files via --read or /read-only.<br>Aider has only built-in slash commands (/add, /commit, /lint, etc.); no user-defined command files.<br>Aider has no subagent or custom-agent system; uses a single model with architect/editor mode.<br>Aider does not support the .agents/skills standard. |
